title: European Fact of the Day, Again
subtitle: This year, like last year, “the European Union will again make more money from fining US tech companies Than from the total tax income from Europe’s own public tech companies!” The post European Fact of the Day, Again appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION .
contentHtml:
This year, like last year, “the European Union will again make more money from fining US tech companies Than from the total tax income from Europe’s own public tech companies!”

The post European Fact of the Day, Again appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION.
